description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic printFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironDo not dry cleanThis bright tee from puma combines the label's love for minimalism with fashion so perfectly that you can wear this with simple denims and flip flops, and look fabulous in ease.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
